title: [Keep, Corridor]
description: Dim, dust-speckled light filters in through small airshafts along the ceiling, illuminating a path through the rubble leading away from a narrow arch between two spindly columns.  Broken furniture and mildew-covered lengths of cloth mingle with the mud and dirt on the granite floor.  The walls contain tall niches, each housing a metal cage, now ruined, that bears traces of gilt and a few semi-precious stones.
